starting_commit_subject: test(workflow): add sanitized sales demo surface build 221
design_cleanup_summary: Tightened hero hierarchy: collapsed three stacked subheads into one scannable value subhead plus the existing 'you stay in control of sales decisions' manual-control line; promoted the 'never miss another roofing lead' hook.
Replaced run-on sentence headings with short headlines plus supporting copy (Inside RoofLeadHQ -> 'A Clear View of Every Lead.').
De-duplicated the final CTA: removed the wall-of-text paragraph that repeated the checklist verbatim; replaced with one concise control-forward line.

Trimmed the repeated 'responds fast, follows up automatically, recovers missed leads, books homeowner inspections' boilerplate across hero card, demo, how-it-works, guided-setup, pricing, why-trust-us, and footer subheads for easier scanning.
Standardized section vertical rhythm (mixed lg:py-32 -> consistent lg:py-28 across 7 sections).
Added CSS polish: scroll-margin-top so in-page nav anchors clear the sticky header, and a visible :focus-visible ring for keyboard accessibility.
Adopted the favicon and control-language edits already present in the working tree (RLHQ-favicon-32x32.png).
mobile_responsiveness_notes: No responsive structure removed; existing Tailwind breakpoints (sm/lg) and mobile menu, mobile sticky CTA, and mobile card scroller preserved. Padding standardization keeps mobile py-20 unchanged.

guardrails_detail.pricing_unchanged: 399/699/999 per month plus setup fees left as-is; site pricing not modified

verification.safe_readiness_fast_lane: PASS (17 checks, includes backend build + live_automation disabled for sms/calendar/vapi_outbound/resend/lindy)
